invariants.name: authority-binding
invariants.claim: Verified BIP340 x-only pubkey is bound to the Cell-declared authority, not merely cryptographically valid.

invariants.name: u64-overflow-prevention
invariants.claim: Nonce increment is guarded before u64 addition in core transition paths.

notes: This matrix will be used by the acceptance harness to prove that every one of the 9 strict criteria has at least one invariant or action-level check that covers it. Gaps here are release blockers for v0.
